recommendations.title: Imagine That
recommendations.overview: A financial executive who can't stop his career downspiral is invited into his daughter's imaginary world, where solutions to his problems await.

recommendations.title: Return of the Living Dead: Necropolis
recommendations.overview: In an attempt to rescue their friend from an evil corporation, a group of teenagers end up releasing a horde of bloodthirsty zombies.

recommendations.title: Andaz Apna Apna
recommendations.overview: Two slackers competing for the affections of an heiress inadvertently become her protectors from an evil criminal.

recommendations.title: Phantoms
recommendations.overview: In the peaceful Colorado town of Snowfield, something evil has wiped out the community. And now, it's up to a group of people to stop it, or at least get out of Snowfield alive.

recommendations.title: Foodfight!
recommendations.overview: The evil Brand X joins a supermarket that becomes a city after closing time.

recommendations.title: Cow Belles
recommendations.overview: In order to learn how to be responsible, two wealthy teen sisters are forced to work in the family business by their exasperated father. When company funds goes missing, it's up to the girls to save the day.
